hooks.command: bash -c 'F=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\",d.get(\"path\",\"\")))" 2>/dev/null); case "$F" in *prisma/schema.prisma*|*prisma/migrations*) echo "[AUTO-AUDIT REQUIRED] Prisma schema was just modified. Invoke skill: sync-schema-exports before completing this task.";; esac'
